codeReview.summary: The commit removes the README Sponsor block, the promotional showcase sections ('Who is with us?' and 'More choices'), funding metadata, the fork note, and all scoped sponsor/promotional image assets. Static checks found no remaining scoped promo/funding/fork references outside .factory mission infrastructure, and the README remains factual and useful for this fork.

summary: Pass: implementation satisfies VAL-CLEAN-003 through VAL-CLEAN-007. Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, docs-cleanup-worker skill, mission shared state, and commit diff; local/static evidence confirmed the target sections/files/assets and stale references are absent.
